status: Ralph Loop Iteration 4: Venue Operator Portal & Analytics System
summary: FamMap Iteration 4: Implemented comprehensive Venue Operator Dashboard enabling venue managers to monitor family engagement and improve their venues. Created venueAnalytics.ts utility (450+ lines) with performance metrics, family demographics analysis, visit patterns tracking, competitive insights, and review analytics. Implemented VenueOperatorDashboard component (500+ lines) with 5 tabbed sections: Overview (metrics), Demographics (visitor profiles), Reviews (management), Competitive Analysis (benchmarking), and Settings (configuration). Created comprehensive test suites: venueAnalytics.test.ts (75+ tests) and VenueOperatorDashboard.test.tsx (55+ tests). Added VenueOperatorDashboard.module.css (600+ lines) with full dark mode support and responsive design. All 283 tests passing (100% success rate), zero TypeScript errors, zero linting errors. Production build successful (64.33 kB gzipped, 1.88s build time). Boss feedback 'Make it better' addressed by introducing sophisticated venue operator tools to improve data quality and venue engagement.
improvements_completed: ✓ Created venueAnalytics.ts utility with comprehensive analytics functions
✓ Implemented family demographics analysis (age groups, interests, accessibility needs, budget levels)
✓ Added visit patterns tracking (peak days, seasonal trends, visit patterns)
✓ Implemented competitive insight calculation (venue ranking, percentiles, strengths, improvement areas)
✓ Created review analytics system with theme detection and response tracking
✓ Built VenueOperatorDashboard component with 5 functional tabs
✓ Implemented Overview tab with metric cards and rating distribution
✓ Created Demographics tab with detailed visitor profile analysis
✓ Built Reviews tab with common themes and recent feedback
✓ Implemented Competitive Analysis tab with venue ranking insights
✓ Created Settings tab with venue claim status and support information
✓ Designed comprehensive CSS styling with dark mode support
✓ Added full responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
✓ Created 75+ unit tests for venueAnalytics utility
✓ All tests passing (130 new tests added)
✓ Full ESLint compliance (zero errors, zero warnings)
✓ Production build successful with consistent bundle size
